title: Union Executive & Parliament
subtitle: Master Part V (Articles 52–151) of the Indian Constitution for SSC CGL Tier-1 & Tier-2
learningOutcomes: Understand the hierarchical structure of the Union Executive from President to Attorney General
Master Presidential powers, election formulas, vetoes, and impeachment under Article 61
Compare the composition, powers, and special privileges of Lok Sabha and Rajya Sabha
Trace the step-by-step passage of Ordinary, Money, Financial, and Constitutional Amendment Bills
Analyze the role, composition, and functions of Standing and Financial Parliamentary Committees
whyImportant: This is the highest-weightage polity module in SSC CGL exams. Questions range from direct article matching and numerical terms/qualifications to complex multi-statement questions on parliamentary procedures, bill passages, and executive veto powers.
